issueReport.title: Grocy health or backup debugging support request
issueReport.bodyMarkdown:
# Grocy health or backup debugging support request

Labels: support, grocy, redacted-bundle

## Problem summary

Describe the failing command, observed status, and whether the issue affects health checks, backup verification, restore planning, or restore drills.

## Attached evidence

Attach the generated support bundle JSON and any referenced public-safe artifacts listed in the bundle.

Do not attach live Grocy exports, credentials, decrypted backup files, or unreviewed local logs.

## Replay expectation

A maintainer should be able to rerun the listed npm commands against synthetic fixtures or reviewed redacted artifacts and compare the referenced checksums.

## Evidence groups

- Health diagnostics evidence
  Evidence: data/grocy-health-diagnostics.json, data/grocy-mock-smoke-report.json
  Replay commands: health_diagnostics
- Encrypted backup verification evidence
  Evidence: generated when this artifact family is present
  Replay commands: backup_verification
- Backup failure replay evidence
  Evidence: data/grocy-backup-restore-failure-drill-report.json
  Replay commands: backup_failure_drill
- Support bundle manifest
  Evidence: data/grocy-support-bundle.json
  Replay commands: support_bundle

## Attachment checklist

- [ ] data/grocy-support-bundle.json
- [ ] data/grocy-health-diagnostics.json
- [ ] data/grocy-mock-smoke-report.json
- [ ] data/grocy-backup-restore-failure-drill-report.json

## Replay commands

- health_diagnostics: `npm run grocy:health:diagnostics`
  Purpose: Refresh the public-safe health diagnostics artifact.
  Evidence: data/grocy-health-diagnostics.json, data/grocy-mock-smoke-report.json
- backup_verification: `npm run grocy:backup:verify -- --output data/grocy-backup-verification-report.json --force`
  Purpose: Refresh the public-safe encrypted-backup verification report without embedding decrypted file contents.
  Evidence: generated when this artifact is present
- backup_failure_drill: `npm run grocy:backup:restore-failure-drill -- --restore-dir restore/grocy-restore-failure-drill`
  Purpose: Replay synthetic corruption, wrong-passphrase, and path-escape rejection evidence.
  Evidence: data/grocy-backup-restore-failure-drill-report.json
- support_bundle: `npm run grocy:support:bundle`
  Purpose: Regenerate the redacted manifest after refreshing diagnostics or backup evidence.
  Evidence: data/grocy-support-bundle.json
